LanguageData.PM_Make_Hook_Standard.label: make a Hook (40 vital fuel)
LanguageData.PM_Make_Hook_Standard.description: Forge a standard Hook. Consumes 20 steel and 40 vital fuel drawn from the network.
LanguageData.PM_Make_Hook_Heavy.label: make a heavy Hook (70 vital fuel)
LanguageData.PM_Make_Hook_Heavy.description: Forge a heavy double-hooked Hook. Consumes 35 steel and 70 vital fuel drawn from the network.
LanguageData.PM_Surgery_InstallCrystallizer.label: install emergency crystallizer
LanguageData.PM_Surgery_InstallCrystallizer.descripti: Grafts an emergency crystallizer onto a body part. Will activate in case of severe bleeding.
